posts.author: OmerK (Omer Koort)
posts.cookedHtml:
Join us for a webinar focused on marketing in the AI era.
In this webinar I will share my preferred AI tools for marketing, covering:

  • Building your own GPT/Gem
  • Favorite “vibe” marketing tools
  • Social media tips

Register and save the date to enhance your marketing skills.

** Intended for marketplace partners, but open for anyone.*
